word: G5448 - φυσιόω - physióō - foo-see-o'-o - Puff up

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to make natural, to cause a thing to pass into nature
2. to inflate, blow up, blow out, to cause to swell up
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G5449 in the primary sense of blowing; to inflate, that is, (figuratively) make proud (haughty): - puff up.
